title: Litematica translation
description:
Litematica Translation Project.
한국어,German Source: OpenAI
body:
# depiction
---

> **Litematica** **Translation** is the translation of [**litematica**](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica).   
This resource pack is my first project, and it was created with the help of a translation program powered by [**_ChatGPT_**](https://chatgpt.com/).  
You can find my blog at the [**_link_**](https://blog.naver.com/arexmado) provided.  
Currently, this resource pack is only about 50% translated  
The supported language is: Korean,German.   
This resource pack was made by referencing and modifying [sodium](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/translations-for-sodium).    
> 
 > The icon artwork was created by [**_ChatGPT_**](https://chatgpt.com/).  

---

# language

<details>
<summary>한국어(korea)</summary>

> **Litematica Translation**은 [**litematica**](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica)의 번역본입니다.  
이 리소스팩은 저의 첫 작품이며, [**_ChatGPT_**](https://chatgpt.com/)를 활용한 번역 프로그램을 통해 제작되었습니다.  
제 블로그는 옆에 있는 [**_링크_**](https://blog.naver.com/arexmado)에서 확인하실 수 있습니다.  
현재 이 리소스팩은 약 50%만 번역이 완료된 상태입니다.  
지원 언어는 한국어,독일어입니다.  
이 리소스팩은 **[sodium](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/translations-for-sodium)** 리소스팩을 참고하여 제작되었습니다.  
아이콘 이미지는 [**_ChatGPT_**](https://chatgpt.com/)가 제작하였습니다.  

---
**~~크리퍼가 싫다면 좋아요를 눌러주세요~~**
</details>


<details>
<summary>Deutsch(Deutschland)</summary>

**Litematica Translation** ist eine **Übersetzung** von **Litematica**. 
Dieses Ressourcenpaket ist mein erstes Werk und wurde mit einem Übersetzungsprogramm erstellt, das ChatGPT nutzt. 
Sie können meinen Blog über den unten stehenden Link besuchen. 
Derzeit ist dieses Ressourcenpaket erst zu etwa 50 % übersetzt. 
Die unterstützte Sprache ist Koreanisch,Deutsch. 
Dieses Ressourcenpaket basiert auf dem Sodium-Ressourcenpaket. 
Das Symbolbild wurde von ChatGPT erstellt. 

</details>

We thank everyone who downloads this.

---
